title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other LLMs locally with a single CLI or Docker container.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API—browser & Node.js support.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; install via pip and chat with local models in a few lines.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration letting you use Ollama models as LLMs, embeddings or chat endpoints.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight retrieval-augmented-generation example using Ollama + SentenceTransformers.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI wrapper around ollama with chat history and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java SDK for Ollama (Spring-friendly) published to Maven Central.

title: ollama-express
summary: Express.js starter that exposes an OpenAI-compatible REST endpoint backed by Ollama.

title: ollama-tools
summary: Experimental repo showing how to give Ollama models function-calling capabilities.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that streams Ollama responses into threads with rate-limiting and admin commands.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-nest
summary: NestJS module that injects Ollama as a provider with decorators for guards & interceptors.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart client for Flutter apps to chat with local Ollama models on desktop/mobile.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by the community: use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library that wraps the Ollama HTTP API with async enumerable streaming.

title: r/ollama – model discussion thread
summary: Active Reddit thread where users share benchmarks, custom mod-files and GPU settings.
